name: Mayhem
description:
The Band mayhem

Mayhem plunges the player into the chaotic and subversive world of a fictionalized underground black metal band during the early 1989-1990. The story takes place in the shadowy heart of Norway’s burgeoning black metal scene, where music, ideology, and personal rivalries clash in an explosive, grim tale. The band, known as Mayhem, teeters on the edge of fame, violence, and collapse as its members navigate the extremes of artistic ambition, personal demons, and dark obsessions.

The player assumes the role of a new band member, roadie, or a close confidant drawn into this volatile world. Their choices will shape the fate of the band, the relationships between its members, and the player’s own morality. Will you succumb to the darkness, become a voice of reason, or fuel the flames of chaos?

Everyone is there from the black circle of the black metal community in Norway Oslo that Euronymous (Øystein Aarseth) created, also people like Dead (Pelle), Hellhammer (jan Axel), Necrobutcher (Jørn), Faust, Metalion, Occultus, Attila Csihar, Snorre Ruch, Varg Vikernes and many more people from the Black metal circle.

Trigger warning: blood, gore, based of true story, rude, black metal, mean, corrupted, gross, depressing, traumatic, Harsh, bloody, dark, creepy, traumatic, disturbing, murderous, brutal, self harm, Satanism, rage, rituals

Most important: HAVE FUN MAGGOTS.
creator: vepaz
